title: NomadSpot Budapest
services: Product Design, Frontend Development, UX Strategy
description: A location-focused discovery experience for digital nomads to find work-friendly cafes in Budapest with Wi-Fi and power reliability signals.
content:
# NomadSpot Budapest

NomadSpot helps remote workers quickly discover where to work across Budapest by focusing on practical decision factors like internet quality, power outlet availability, and atmosphere.

## Key Highlights
- Mission-control style browsing and filtering
- Fast scanning by vibe and workspace intent
- Location-aware discovery with clear empty-state handling

## Live Website
- https://wfc-dun.vercel.app/

title: OptiSupply Dashboard
services: Dashboard Design, Data Visualization, Web App Development
description: An ethical supply-chain intelligence dashboard experience focused on operational visibility, decision confidence, and scalable monitoring workflows.
content:
# OptiSupply Dashboard

OptiSupply is positioned as an ethical supply-chain intelligence platform. The dashboard is designed for operational clarity, combining actionable insights with a clean enterprise UX.

## Key Highlights
- KPI-first dashboard workflow
- Operational monitoring for supply-chain decisions
- Enterprise-oriented layout and interaction patterns

## Live Website
- https://optisupply.vercel.app/dashboard

title: GameClub Iran
description: A Persian-language PS5 account storefront with instant delivery messaging, trust-building conversion sections, and category-led merchandising.
content:
# GameClub Iran

GameClub Iran is a conversion-oriented ecommerce experience for legal PS5 accounts in the Iranian market, with localized content and strong trust messaging.

## Key Highlights
- Persian-first storefront and content architecture
- Fast-delivery and support-focused purchase journey
- Promotion and category modules designed for higher conversion

## Live Website
- https://nextplay-eight.vercel.app/
